final:
module RefModule(
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    input wire [2:0] command_in,
    output reg [2:0] state_out
);

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) begin
            state_out <= 3'b000;
        end else begin
            state_out <= command_in;
        end
    end
endmodule
